channel.title: 2026-04-21 AI × Science 文献日报 RSS
channel.description: 2026-04-21 当天筛选出的 AI × 物理 / 化学 / 材料交叉文献 RSS。

item.title: A neural network approach for two-body systems with spin and isospin degrees of freedom
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Chuanxin Wang, Tomoya Naito, Jian Li, Haozhao Liang
arXiv:2403.16819v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: We propose an enhanced machine learning method to calculate the ground state of two-body systems. By extending the original method [Naito, Naito, and Hashimoto, Phys. Rev. Research 5, 033189 (2023)], the present method enables consideration of the spin and isospin degrees of freedom by employing a non-fully connected deep neural network and the unsupervised machine learning technique. The validity of this method is verified by calculating the unique bound state of the deuteron.

item.title: Automated Classification of Plasma Regions at Mars Using Machine Learning
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Yilan Qin, Chuanfei Dong, Hongyang Zhou, Chi Zhang, Kaichun Xu, Jiawei Gao, Simin Shekarpaz, Xinmin Li, Liang Wang
arXiv:2604.17131v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The plasma environment around Mars is highly variable because it is strongly influenced by the solar wind. Accurate identification of plasma regions around Mars is important for the community studying solar wind-Mars interactions, region-specific plasma processes, and atmospheric escape. In this study, we develop a machine-learning-based classifier to automatically identify three key plasma regions--solar wind, magnetosheath, and induced magnetosphere--using only ion omnidirectional energy spectra measured by the MAVEN Solar Wind Ion Analyzer (SWIA). Two neural network architectures are evaluated: a multilayer perceptron (MLP) and a convolutional neural network (CNN) that incorporates short temporal sequences. Our results show that the CNN c…

item.title: Autoregressive prediction of 2D MHD dynamics inferred from deep learning modeling
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 David Kivarkis, Waleed Mouhali, Sadruddin Benkadda, Kai Schneider
arXiv:2604.18221v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We develop two deep learning surrogate autoregressive models for the prediction of the temporal evolution of two-dimensional ideal magnetohydrodynamic (MHD) Kelvin-Helmholtz instabilities across a range of magnetic field strengths. Using two neural network architectures, a Koopman-based Transformer model and a ConvLSTM-UNet, our approach enables simultaneous prediction of vorticity and current density directly from high-resolution simulations. The models are trained in an autoregressive manner and are able to reproduce key features of the multiscale dynamics over several instability growth and nonlinear saturation phases. Beyond accurate field reconstruction, the surrogates preserve essential physical structures of ideal MHD dynamics, includ…

item.title: Contraction and Hourglass Persistence for Learning on Graphs, Simplices, and Cells
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Mattie Ji, Indradyumna Roy, Vikas Garg
arXiv:2604.17548v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Persistent homology (PH) encodes global information, such as cycles, and is thus increasingly integrated into graph neural networks (GNNs). PH methods in GNNs typically traverse an increasing sequence of subgraphs. In this work, we first expose limitations of this inclusion procedure. To remedy these shortcomings, we analyze contractions as a principled topological operation, in particular, for graph representation learning. We study the persistence of contraction sequences, which we call Contraction Homology (CH). We establish that forward PH and CH differ in expressivity. We then introduce Hourglass Persistence, a class of topological descriptors that interleave a sequence of inclusions and contractions to boost expressivity, learnability,…

item.title: Demonstrating Real Advantage of Machine-Learning-Enhanced Monte Carlo for Combinatorial Optimization
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Luca Maria Del Bono, Federico Ricci-Tersenghi, Francesco Zamponi
arXiv:2510.19544v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Combinatorial optimization problems are central to both practical applications and the development of optimization methods. While classical and quantum algorithms have been refined over decades, machine learning--assisted approaches are comparatively recent and have not yet consistently outperformed simple, state-of-the-art classical methods. Here, we focus on a class of Quadratic Unconstrained Binary Optimization (QUBO) problems, specifically the challenge of finding minimum energy configurations in three-dimensional Ising spin glasses. We use a Global Annealing Monte Carlo algorithm that integrates standard local moves with global moves proposed via machine learning. We show that local moves play a crucial role in achieving optimal per…

item.title: 开放热力学一致化学反应网络中的涌现非互易性
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Daniel Evans, Yizhi Shen, Ahmad K. Omar
该工作证明开放、热力学一致的化学反应网络拓扑可在非平衡稳态附近产生振荡不稳定性，这些不稳定性源于恒化器诱导的Onsager互易性破缺，而局域平衡假设保持动力学耗散部分的变分结构。数值结果证实反应-扩散系统中此类非互易性产生振荡动力学，同时仍最小化自由能。

item.title: Fermi Sets: Universal and interpretable neural architectures for fermions
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Liang Fu
arXiv:2601.02508v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We introduce Fermi Sets, a universal and physically interpretable neural architecture for fermionic many-body wavefunctions. Building on a ``parity-graded'' representation [1], we prove that any continuous fermionic wavefunction on a compact domain can be approximated to arbitrary accuracy by a linear combination of K antisymmetric basis functions--such as pairwise products or Slater determinants--multiplied by symmetric functions. A key result is that the number of required bases is provably small: K=1 suffices in one-dimensional continua (and on lattices in any dimension), K=2 suffices in two dimensions, and in higher dimensions K grows at most linearly with particle number. The antisymmetric bases can be learned by small neural networ…

item.title: Physics-Informed Neural Networks for Maximizing Quantum Fisher Information in Time-Dependent Many-Body Systems
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Antonio Ferrer-Sánchez, Yolanda Vives-Gilabert, Yue Ban, Xi Chen, José D. Martín-Guerrero
arXiv:2604.18506v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Quantum Fisher Information (QFI) sets the ultimate precision limit for parameter estimation and is therefore a central quantity in quantum metrology. In time-dependent many-body systems, however, maximizing QFI is a highly non-trivial task due to the combined effects of non-commutativity, control complexity, and the exponential growth of the Hilbert space. In this work, we present a physics-informed neural network (PINN) framework to address this problem through the learning of counter-diabatic quantum dynamics. Our approach combines a variational PINN formulation with a Magnus-expansion treatment of time-ordered evolution, enabling the adiabatic gauge potential and the scheduling function to be inferred directly from the underlying physic…

item.title: Signature of Unconventional Superconductivity in the High Temperature Normal State Resistivity
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Yuchen Wu, Yiwen Liu, Wanyue Lin, Zohar Nussinov, Sheng Ran
arXiv:2604.16433v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Unconventional superconductivity remains one of the central unsolved problems in quantum materials, and revealing its connection to the normal state is widely believed to be key to uncovering the pairing mechanism. Previous efforts have largely focused on the temperature range immediately above the superconducting transition, where specific scattering channels-such as strange-metal transport-have been identified as sharing a possible microscopic origin with superconductivity. Here, using machine learning, we demonstrate a strong correlation between normal-state resistivity and superconductivity in Fe-based superconductors. Remarkably, the predictive information reside in a wide window of 150-300 K, far above T_c of this family. We further sh…

item.title: TGLF-WINN: Data-Efficient Deep Learning Surrogate for Turbulent Transport Modeling in Fusion
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Yadi Cao, Futian Zhang, Wesley Liu, Tom Neiser, Orso Meneghini, Lawson Fuller, Sterling Smith, Raffi Nazikian, Brian Sammuli, Rose Yu
arXiv:2509.07024v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: The Trapped Gyro-Landau Fluid (TGLF) model provides fast, accurate predictions of turbulent transport in tokamaks, but whole device simulations requiring thousands of evaluations remain computationally expensive. Neural network (NN) surrogates offer accelerated inference with fully differentiable approximations that enable gradient-based coupling but typically require large training datasets to capture transport flux variations across plasma conditions, creating significant training burden and limiting applicability to expensive gyrokinetic simulations. We propose TGLF-WINN (Wavenumber-Informed Neural Network) with three key innovations: (1) principled feature engineering that reduces target prediction range, simplifying the learning tas…

item.title: Machine learning-assisted high-throughput screening of superlattice-like O-PCM thin films
item.description:
📚 npj Computational Materials
👤 Hongjian Yuan, Genmao Zhuang, Yang Ren, Hong Wang, Jian Hui
npj Computational Materials, Published online: 21 April 2026; doi:10.1038/s41524-026-02091-0 Machine learning-assisted high-throughput screening of superlattice-like O-PCM thin films

item.title: From membership-privacy leakage to quantum machine unlearning
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. Applied
👤 Junjian Su, Runze He, Guanghui Li, Sujuan Qin, Zhimin He, Haozhen Situ, and Fei Gao
Author(s): Junjian Su, Runze He, Guanghui Li, Sujuan Qin, Zhimin He, Haozhen Situ, and Fei Gao Quantum machine learning (QML) has the potential to achieve quantum advantage for specific tasks by combining quantum computation with classical machine learning (ML). In classical ML, a significant challenge is membership-privacy leakage, whereby an attacker can infer from model outputs whether spe… [Phys. Rev. Applied 25, 044056] Published Tue Apr 21, 2026

item.title: Predicting Solvation Free Energies of Molecules and Ions via First-Principles and Machine-Learning Molecular Dynamics
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Junting Yu, Shuo-Hui Li, Ding Pan
arXiv:2604.17076v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The solvation free energy (SFE) of molecules and ions is a fundamental property governing their solvation behavior and solubility. Molecular simulations offer a route to compute SFEs using alchemical free energy methods, such as thermodynamic integration or free energy perturbation. However, these methods suffer from the infamous end-point singularity, which leads to numerical instability when atoms approach closely, a challenge that becomes particularly acute in ab initio and machine learning molecular dynamics simulations. Here, we introduce the bubble method to calculate the SFEs of molecules and ions from first principles. Our approach avoids the end-state problem in both ab initio and machine learning molecular dynamics simulations and…

item.title: [ASAP] Machine Learning-Assisted Design Framework of Carbon Edge-Dominated Dual-Atom Catalysts for Urea Electrosynthesis
item.description:
📚 ACS Nano: Latest Articles (ACS Publications)
👤 Yun Han, Qingchao Fang, Qilong Wu, Hanqing Yin, Md Tarikal Nasir, Xin Mao, Qin Li, Xiangdong Yao, and Aijun Du
ACS Nano DOI: 10.1021/acsnano.6c04319

item.title: Uncertainty-aware phase fraction prediction and active-learning-guided out-of-domain discovery of refractory multi-principal element alloys
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 A. K. Shargh, C. D. Stiles, J. A. El-Awady
arXiv:2604.18322v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Refractory multi-principal element alloys (RMPEAs) represent a novel class of alloys characterized by an extensive compositional design space and the potential for exceptional mechanical performance under extreme conditions. While accurate phase stability prediction is essential for their robust design, existing machine learning approaches rely on deterministic mappings from composition-derived features to phase labels, neglecting the uncertainty inherent in such predictions. In this study, we present a deep learning framework based on Mixture Density Networks (MDNs) to predict phase fractions in RMPEAs and quantify the associated aleatoric uncertainty across a wide temperature range. By training separate models for up to six constituent pha…

item.title: [ASAP] Metasurface-Based Wavelength-Multiplexed Diffractive Neural Networks for Multilabel Intelligent Vision
item.description:
📚 Nano Letters: Latest Articles (ACS Publications)
👤 Rui Yang, Lei Chen, Zhao Wang, Liangpeng Wei, Mingke Wu, Daqi Zhu, and Yinan Zhang
Nano Letters DOI: 10.1021/acs.nanolett.6c00655

item.title: Linking Device Dynamics to Neural Network Performance in Ionically Gated Synaptic Transistors
item.description:
📚 Preprints
👤 Nithil Harris Manimaran, Huayuan Han, Cory Merkel, Ke Xu
Neuromorphic computing based on artificial synapses requires devices capable of gradual, repeatable, and energy-efficient conductance modulation. Ionically gated transistors are promising candidates because their ion dynamics naturally produce synaptic behavior under low-voltage operation. However, how key device characteristics—conductance range, number of accessible conductance states N, and weight-update nonlinearity β—jointly influence neural network performance remains insufficiently understood. Here, we investigate MoS2-based ionically gated synaptic transistors using a combined experimental and modeling framework that links device physics to hardware-aware artificial neural network (ANN) simulations across image-classification tasks of varying complexity. We show that under fixed-a…

item.title: Boltzmann Machine Learning with a Parallel, Persistent Markov chain Monte Carlo method for Estimating Evolutionary Fields and Couplings from a Protein Multiple Sequence Alignment
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Sanzo Miyazawa
arXiv:2604.18022v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: The inverse Potts problem for estimating evolutionary single-site fields and pairwise couplings in homologous protein sequences from their single-site and pairwise amino acid frequencies observed in their multiple sequence alignment would be still one of useful methods in the studies of protein structure and evolution. Since the reproducibility of fields and couplings are the most important, the Boltzmann machine method is employed here, although it is computationally intensive. In order to reduce computational time required for the Boltzmann machine, parallel, persistent Markov chain Monte Carlo method is employed to estimate the single-site and pairwise marginal distributions in each learning step. Also, stochastic gradient descent metho…

item.title: Neural Operator: Is data all you need to model the world? An insight into the paradigm of data-driven scientific ML
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Hrishikesh Viswanath, Md Ashiqur Rahman, Abhijeet Vyas, Andrey Shor, Beatriz Medeiros, Stephanie Hernandez, Suhas Eswarappa Prameela, Aniket Bera
arXiv:2301.13331v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Numerical approximations of partial differential equations (PDEs) are routinely employed to formulate the solution of physics, engineering, and mathematical problems involving functions of several variables, such as the propagation of heat or sound, fluid flow, elasticity, electrostatics, electrodynamics, and more. While this has led to solving many complex phenomena, there are some limitations. Conventional approaches such as Finite Element Methods (FEMs) and Finite Difference Methods (FDMs) require considerable time and are computationally expensive. In contrast, data-driven machine learning-based methods, such as neural networks, provide a faster, fairly accurate alternative, and, in particular, focus on neural operators, which…

item.title: Scalable Physics-Informed Neural Differential Equations and Data-Driven Algorithms for HVAC Systems
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Hanfeng Zhai, Hongtao Qiao, Hassan Mansour, Christopher Laughman
arXiv:2604.18438v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We present a scalable, data-driven simulation framework for large-scale heating, ventilation, and air conditioning (HVAC) systems that couples physics-informed neural ordinary differential equations (PINODEs) with differential-algebraic equation (DAE) solvers. At the component level, we learn heat-exchanger dynamics using an implicit PINODE formulation that predicts conserved quantities (refrigerant mass Mᵣ and internal energy Eₕₓ₎ as outputs, enabling physics-informed training via automatic differentiation of mass/energy balances. Stable long-horizon prediction is achieved through gradient-stabilized latent evolution with gated architectures and layer normalization. At the system level, we integrate learned components with DAE solvers (IDA…

item.title: 非厄米磁性约瑟夫森结中的0-π转变
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Roberto Capecelatro, Marco Marciani, Claudio Guarcello, Gabriele Campagnano, Procolo Lucignano, Roberta Citro
该研究考虑超导-量子点-超导器件与铁磁金属库耦合并置于外磁场中的非厄米磁性约瑟夫森结输运性质。关注随磁场幅度增大平衡相位差从φ=0到φ=π的0-π转变，环境耦合诱导自旋依赖耗散并展宽Andreev能级。结合格林函数计算与限制于子能隙Andreev准束缚态的有效非厄米描述，证明耗散使0-π转变移向更高磁场。外场与库磁化方向的相对角度也可在固定场强下驱动转变，此效应完全归因于非厄米哈密顿量复本征值的行为，凸显非厄米性作为工程量子器件新调控自由度的潜力。

item.title: A Practical Introduction to Tensor Network Renormalization with TNRKit.jl
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Victor Vanthilt, Adwait Naravane, Chenqi Meng, Atsushi Ueda
arXiv:2604.06922v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We present TNRKit, an open-source Julia package for Tensor Network Renormalization (TNR) of two- and three-dimensional classical statistical models and Euclidean lattice field theories. Built on top of TensorKit, it provides a symmetry-aware framework for constructing tensor-network representations of partition functions and coarse-graining them using methods such as TRG, HOTRG, and LoopTNR. Beyond thermodynamic quantities, the package enables the extraction of universal conformal data -- including scaling dimensions and the central charge -- directly from fixed-point tensors. TNRKit is designed with both usability and extensibility in mind, offering a practical platform for applying, benchmarking, and developing modern tensor renormaliz…

item.title: SiMOS与Si/SiGe量子点中的各向异性自旋-能谷耦合
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 N. Tobias Jacobson, Natalie D. Foster, Ryan M. Jock, Andrew M. Mounce, Daniel R. Ward, Malcolm S. Carroll, Dwight R. Luhman
该工作测量了SiMOS和Si/SiGe两种硅自旋量子点平台中界面自旋-轨道耦合对外加磁场方向与大小的角依赖关系。通过构建物理模型从拟合数据中提取谷内与谷间自旋-轨道耦合物理，实现了两种材料体系的直接对比，发现尽管g因子差异相当，但两者的自旋-轨道耦合特性存在显著差异。

item.title: 平面约瑟夫森结中的各向异性超导二极管效应
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Abhishek Chilampankunnel Prasannan, Baris Pekerten, Nowar Alashkar, Alex Matos-Abiague
该理论研究共存Rashba和Dresselhaus自旋-轨道耦合（SOC）的近邻化平面约瑟夫森结在面内磁场下的超导二极管效应（SDE）的磁性与晶格各向异性。对称性分析识别出SDE被独立于场强抑制的磁场与晶向几何约束；现象学模型表明二极管效率依赖于自旋-轨道场与磁场的相对取向，窄结低场区域的解析方法将SDE各向异性与SOC诱导的费米面畸变及各向异性库珀对动量关联。紧束缚模拟复现近期实验趋势，揭示静电栅压可在低场区诱导SDE极性反转。

item.title: 反铁磁体中非对称散射诱导的奈尔自旋轨道力矩
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Sayan Sarkar, Amit Agarwal
证明非对称杂质散射与布洛赫电子的反常自旋极化率(ASP)耦合时，可产生额外的PT奇自旋极化。该外禀贡献源于反对称高阶散射过程与能带几何的 interplay，将原本PT偶的磁化率转化为交错自旋极化。以四方CuMnAs最小模型展示，此反常斜散射贡献可与常规对称散射(Drude)贡献相当，甚至在足够杂质密度下超越之，为反铁磁电学操控提供新途径。

item.title: AtomTwin.jl: a physics-native digital twin framework for neutral-atom quantum processors
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Shannon Whitlock
arXiv:2604.18531v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: AtomTwin.jl is an open-source Julia package for developing and simulating quantum protocols, hardware configurations and building digital twins for neutral-atom quantum processors and related atomic quantum devices. AtomTwin operates between mathematical models and physical devices; modeling atoms, optical tweezers, laser fields, atomic motion, interactions, and noise processes natively from physical geometry and parameters, without requiring users to define Hamiltonians manually. The package provides hardware-level instruction sequences, high-performance solvers for coupled quantum and classical dynamics, and a ready-to-use model for ytterbium-171 atoms in an extensible framework designed to accommodate a greater variety of atomic species…

item.title: 三角晶格低能Kondo模型中的手性磁性与量子反常霍尔效应
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Kai Vylet, Xingkai Huang, Leon Balents
该研究在三角晶格低能Kondo模型中，考虑巡游电子占据布里渊区Γ点价带口袋和M点三个导带口袋的费米面嵌套结构。将局域矩视为经典自旋，在四子格磁单胞中发现广泛的非共面磁有序区域，包括四面体及倾斜四面体态。手性相在较宽的口袋间Kondo耦合范围内保持稳定，并在外磁场下持续存在。特定手性有序可使电子能带打开能隙，形成σₓy=4e²/h的量子反常霍尔态，表明三角晶格上的手性磁性与量子化反常霍尔效应可不依赖特定紧束缚能带结构，而由低能嵌套口袋更一般地产生。

item.title: I型超导体中间态中超导/正常态畴壁的集体共振
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Mengju Yuan, Yugang Zhang, Ying Zhu, Jingchun Gao, Aifeng Wang, Mingquan He, Jun-Yi Ge, Yisheng Chai
该研究利用交流磁致伸缩技术探测铅中间态中超导/正常态（S/N）畴壁的体相动力学，发现了一种准共振响应：虚部符号反转、实部随频率非单调演化。此行为归因于正常畴内涡流驱动的S/N界面集体振荡，揭示了超导调制相中此前被磁测量掩盖的基本动力学通道，确立了交流磁致伸缩系数作为探测隐藏界面物理的有力工具。

item.title: Correlation-Converged Virtual Orbitals for Accurate and Efficient Quantum Molecular Simulations
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Qian Wang, Calvin Ku, Jyh-Pin Chou, Peng-Jen Chen, Alice Hu, Min-Hsiu Hsieh
arXiv:2604.16928v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Density functional theory with plane-wave basis sets is widely employed in computational materials science, including applications to isolated molecular systems. However, the inadequate description of electron correlation remains a fundamental limitation. Accurate correlation treatments based on many-body Hamiltonians require reliable representations of both occupied and virtual orbitals, yet virtual orbitals are often poorly described in conventional computational schemes, resulting in reduced accuracy. In this work, we introduce localized correlation-converged virtual orbitals (LCCVOs) as an efficient basis for constructing accurate many-body Hamiltonians in molecular systems. Using a substantially reduced number of orbitals, the LCCVO fra…

item.title: Crystallographic Challenges in Microscopy of Multidomain Spinel Materials
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Ninon Scherz, Shashwat Anand, Colin Ophus, Tucker Holstun, Mary Scott, Tara P. Mishra, Gerbrand Ceder
arXiv:2604.17561v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Electron microscopy techniques are instrumental in the characterization of energy storage materials, with atomic resolution images providing the detailed structural features that are needed to understand their properties. Atomically resolved electron microscopy techniques have been routinely used to study the microstructure in high performing Mn-based oxide cathodes, which often contain spinel-like ordering. Here, we evaluate STEM-HAADF imaging and subsequent Fourier filtering as tools for characterizing δ-DRX spinel domains and their antiphase boundaries, which play a central role in the material's electrochemical performance. Using electron microscopy simulations and recent theoretical insight into the structural makeup of δ-DRX, we attemp…

item.title: 蜂窝状二维框架中的无金属设计型交替磁性
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Hongde Yu, Thomas Brumme, Thomas Heine
该研究提出分子设计策略，在三并苯衍生自由基中通过将单体点群对称性从D₃ₕ降至C₂ᵥ，选择性破缺反演对称性同时保持二分晶格，在蜂窝状二维晶体中实现无金属交替磁性。自旋极化密度泛函计算显示强反铁磁耦合（-130 meV）、M点d波自旋劈裂（17 meV）及Mott-Hubbard能隙（1.26 eV），与Lieb定理一致；紧束缚模型揭示各向异性最近邻跃迁是交替磁性的微观起源，双轴压缩应变可进一步增强该效应。

item.title: 二维d波交错磁体中四重自旋纹理锁定的直接观测
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Dan Mu, Bei Jiang, Qingchen Duan, Zulin Xu, Xingkai Cheng, Yusen Xiao, Xinru Han, Xinyu Liang, Zhaokun Luo, Ryan L. Kong, Qiheng Wang, Junwei Liu, Jianxin Zhong, Ruidan Zhong, Qiangqiang Gu, Baiqing Lv, Hong Ding
利用原位可场切换的自旋极化Cr针尖，在RbV₂Se₂O中实现准粒子干涉的自旋对比度成像，克服交错磁体长期实验瓶颈。结果显示该材料电子态在子晶格层面呈现d波型自旋纹理，自旋取向主要沿c轴，首次提供自旋-晶格锁定的原子尺度证据。干涉图案呈现显著自旋依赖调制，确立自旋散射锁定和自旋动量锁定，为交错磁性态提供决定性实验基准。

item.title: 偶极里德伯阵列中关联量子态的耗散制备
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Mingsheng Tian, Zhen Bi, Thomas Iadecola, Bryce Gadway
本文提出一种耗散协议，通过引入两类可控耗散辅助原子作为非互易的激发和退激发通道，实现能量选择性非互易跃迁，引导偶极量子系统趋向目标多体态。该方法可在整个多体谱范围内稳定化量子态，不限于基态且无需预先知晓哈密顿量，为可编程平台中的量子态制备提供灵活可扩展的框架。

item.title: 具有非厄米Gamma相互作用的横场Ising链中的动态自旋向列序
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Yu-Hong Yan, Ran Wang, Kun-Liang Zhang
该研究探讨非厄米Gamma相互作用对横场Ising链相变和磁关联的影响。除有能隙铁磁相和顺磁相外，发现存在无能隙相，其中系统因宇称-时间对称性破缺而呈现长程自旋向列序。宇称-时间对称性破缺还导致动态自旋向列序的出现，为非平衡动力学表征自旋向列相图提供途径。Ising相互作用、横场和非厄米Gamma相互作用的竞争产生丰富量子相，并为在自旋链中生成自旋向列序提供方案。

item.title: 近自旋-空间共振旋量玻色-爱因斯坦凝聚体的动力学
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 W. Wills, D. Blume, Q. Guan
该工作发展了耦合通道框架描述旋量玻色-爱因斯坦凝聚体的动力学，重点关注自旋动力学与空间激发共振附近的行为。利用旋量BEC中自旋相关与非相关散射长度的差异，以非自旋依赖部分的Bogoliubov模式为基函数，发现通过调节二次Zeeman位移可激发两类Bogoliubov模式共振，且标准Bogoliubov理论忽略的高阶项在共振附近的长时动力学中变得至关重要。

item.title: 偶极平面转子链量子相的有效理论
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Estêvão V. B. de Oliveira, Muhammad Shaeer Moeed, Pierre-Nicholas Roy
该工作利用不含时微扰理论和小角度二次近似发展相互作用偶极平面转子集体行为的理论描述。对无序相证明不含时微扰理论的适用性；对有序相基于偶极序的稳定平衡构型构建二次近似，并证明势能展开中四次项对纠正量子化歧义导致的能谱移动至关重要。采用精确对角化和密度矩阵重正化群数值技术对两种近似进行基准测试。

item.title: 弱莫特绝缘体中量子自旋液体的电场调控
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Daniel J. Schultz, Alexandre Khoury, Félix Desrochers, Omid Tavakol, Emily Z. Zhang, Yong Baek Kim
三角晶格Hubbard模型在强耦合下具有丰富相图，包括手征自旋液体相，但实验上难以调控t/U比。本文研究直流电场通过重整化交换相互作用来调控该模型，进行四阶小t/U展开，导出电场下的环交换模型，发现电场不仅引入空间各向异性，还增强环交换项相对于最近邻海森堡相互作用的重要性，为实验实现手征自旋液体提供新途径。

item.title: 铁磁Kondo晶格CeCo₂As₂中的增强反常能斯特效应
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Shuyue Guan, Weian Guo, Pengyu Zheng, Xinxuan Lin, Yuqing Huang, Jiawei Li, Xiao-Bin Qiang, Longfei Li, Weiwei Xie, Hai-Zhou Lu, Zhiping Yin, Shuang Jia
该工作报道铁磁Kondo晶格CeCo₂As₂中增强的自发反常能斯特效应(ANE)，其Kondo屏蔽的铈基4f矩嵌入铁磁d电子框架中。观测到的大反常能斯特系数超过塞贝克系数，归因于f轨道主导平带中的强贝里曲率。增强的ANE作为费米能钉扎于拓扑平带的特征，凸显Kondo晶格中关联驱动拓扑的重要性。

item.title: Rb₁₋ₓV₂Te₂O中的G型反铁磁结构
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Wu Xie (Spallation Neutron Source Science Center, Dongguan 523803, P. R. China), Changchao Liu (School of Physics, Zhejiang University, Hangzhou, China), Fayuan Zhang (Quantum Science Center of Guangdong-Hong Kong-Macao Greater Bay Area, Shenzhen 518045, China), Zhenhong Tan (Spallation Neutron Source Science Center, Dongguan 523803, P. R. China), Wenhai Ji (Spallation Neutron Source Science Center, Dongguan 523803, P. R. China), Nan Zhao (Spallation Neutron Source Science Center, Dongguan 523803, P. R. China), Lingxiang Bao (Spallation Neutron Source Science Center, Dongguan 523803, P. R. China), Dong Zhang (Spallation Neutron Source Science Center, Dongguan 523803, P. R. China), Feiran Shen (Spallation Neutron Source Science Center, Dongguan 523803, P. R. China), Lunhua He (Spallation Neutron Source Science Center, Dongguan 523803, P. R. China), Hao Wang (Spallation Neutron Source Science Center, Dongguan 523803, P. R. China), Rong Du (Spallation Neutron Source Science Center, Dongguan 523803, P. R. China), Guanghan Cao (School of Physics, Zhejiang University, Hangzhou, China), Chaoyu Chen (Songshan Lake Materials Laboratory, Dongguan, China), Ping Miao (Spallation Neutron Source Science Center, Dongguan 523803, P. R. China)
该研究通过中子粉末衍射（NPD）探究了室温交替磁性候选材料Rb₁₋ₓV₂Te₂O的磁结构，发现其在337 K以下形成G型反铁磁结构，与原有理论预期不同。这一结果为理解该具有层状结构和d波自旋对称性的金属性交替磁体的物理机制提供了新视角。

item.title: 单粒子与多体量子磁振子态的生成
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Violet Williams, Jayakrishnan M. P. Nair, Yaroslav Tserkovnyak, Benedetta Flebus
该工作构建了固态自旋缺陷系综与共享磁性 baths 耦合的理论框架，研究发射磁振子之间的量子关联及其对实验可调参数的依赖。结果表明发射磁振子保留了固态发射体固有的量子关联，为确定性生成量子多体磁振子态提供了途径。

item.title: 亚铁磁薄膜中的通用斯格明子相图
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 M. V. Wijethunga, X. R. Wang
研究亚铁磁斯格明子中反铁磁耦合子晶格间交换作用J的变化如何调控稳定与亚稳构型，引入无量纲参数ζₑff表征强/弱子晶格锁定之间的交叉。强耦合区可实现无DMI子晶格中斯格明子稳定化，获得无DMI亚铁磁斯格明子；J减小时锁定破坏导致独立子晶格行为，基于有效κ的描述失效。该工作建立了子晶格交换与斯格明子相稳定性的统一框架。

item.title: 近场效应对磁活性弹性体磁滞回线的影响
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Pawan Patel, Dirk Romeis, Marina Saphiannikova
建立多尺度理论框架研究磁活性弹性体(MAEs)磁滞起源，重点考察磁化/退磁过程中内部微结构演化。系统总能量由磁能和微观力学贡献构成，圆柱样品宏观形变完全约束。粒子相互作用先从纯偶极-偶极作用建模，再扩展至包含近距离高阶近场效应。结果表明软磁颗粒MAEs的磁滞主要源于被困微结构重排，导致升降磁场下不同颗粒构型。

item.title: Learning time-dependent and integro-differential collision operators from plasma phase space data using differentiable simulators
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Diogo D. Carvalho, Luis O. Silva, E. Paulo Alves
arXiv:2601.13377v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Collisional and stochastic wave-particle dynamics in plasmas far from equilibrium are complex, temporally evolving, stochastic processes which are challenging to model. In this work, we extend previous methods coupling differentiable kinetic simulators and plasma phase space diagnostics to learn collision operators that account for time-varying background distributions. We also introduce a more general integro-differential operator formulation to probe relevant terms in the collision operator. To validate the proposed methodology we use data generated by self-consistent electromagnetic Particle-in-Cell simulations. We show that both approaches recover operators that can accurately reproduce the plasma phase space dynamics while being mor…

item.title: 表面铁磁体GdAg₂/Ag(111)中磁涨落对自旋轨道杂化的抑制
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Ryo Noguchi, Jongkeun Jung, Younsik Kim, Sungsoo Hahn, Changyoung Kim
利用变温和偏振依赖角分辨光电子能谱，研究二维外尔节线型表面铁磁体GdAg₂/Ag(111)发现：自旋涨落可在居里温度以上保留节线衍生能带交叉，而SOC诱导杂化仅在低温发展。高温杂化抑制归因于自旋退相干和能带依赖散射，可用有效非厄米框架描述。该工作确立磁涨落作为调控SOC杂化及贝里曲率的旋钮，为探索非厄米能带物理提供磁性平台。

item.title: LaFeAsO超导能隙的磁性与对称性：动力学平均场理论研究
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 S. L. Skornyakov, V. I. Anisimov, A. A. Katanin
该工作采用密度泛函理论结合动力学平均场理论（DFT+DMFT）研究电子关联对铁基母化合物LaFeAsO磁性和超导性质的影响。发现静态非局域磁化率在面内波矢Q=(π,π)处出现峰，阶梯近似中顶点修正使其显著增强并导致磁不稳定性。考虑Bethe-Salpeter方程的本征函数，在二阶微扰和含动态相互作用顶点的阶梯近似中分别得到d波和s±序参量的主导，后者的优势与巡游自由度对磁阻挫的降低（仅部分形成局域磁矩）相关。

item.title: Medium-Throughput Evaluation of Transport and Optical Responses in Altermagnets
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Fu Li, Bo Zhao, Vikrant Chaudhary, Shengqiao Wang, Chen Shen, Hao Wang, Hongbin Zhang
arXiv:2604.17071v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Altermagnets provide a promising platform for unconventional transport and optical responses beyond conventional ferromagnets and antiferromagnets. In this work, we develop a medium-throughput first-principles workflow to evaluate transport and optical properties in approximately 150 known altermagnetic compounds collected from the MAGNDATA database. By combining density functional theory, Wannier interpolation, and symmetry analysis, we investigate representative linear and nonlinear responses, including the anomalous Hall effect, magneto-optical Kerr effect, and bulk photovoltaic effect. We find that these responses are strongly constrained by magnetic symmetry and further shaped by spin-orbit coupling, band structure, and inversion symmet…

item.title: YCaHₙ(n=8-20)高压超氢化物中的金属原子(无序)有序与超导性
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Masashi W. Kimura, Seong Won Jang, Nisha Geng, Eva Zurek
该工作采用密度泛函理论计算研究Y-Ca超氢化物YCaHₙ(n=8-20)的结构、性质及金属原子无序和掺杂增强超导转变温度的潜力。YCaH₈存在多种近等焓的金属原子排布相，表明构型熵对稳定性的重要影响；等摩尔比使费米能级处于态密度峰处，在180 GPa下各向同性Eliashberg框架中T_c分别达149 K(P4/mmm)和170 K(Cmmm)。YCaH₁₂也被预测为无序相，但其有序变体的T_c在200 GPa下分布范围宽(105-253 K)，显示掺杂可轻微增强或大幅降低T_c。YCaH₁₈和YCaH₂₀仅预测到单一动力学稳定超氢化物。

item.title: 莫尔超晶格对交替电四极序的调控
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Alejandro Lopez-Bezanilla
该工作展示莫尔超晶格可将交替电性（无净极化的补偿铁电态，由四极电子序重塑低能电子结构）转化为可控相。在Bloch周期双轨道理论中，缓变层间配准被粗粒化为作用于自洽双分量交替电四极的有效莫尔场， resulting相在强填充依赖的不稳定性阈值之上发展，并从弱选择区渡越到稳健的轴主导基态。配准-相位扫描提供了通过内部四极空间的显式连续路径，证实莫尔超晶格不仅稳定交替电性，还操控其内部取向。

item.title: 轨道玻璃隐藏相对论性莫特绝缘体中的缺失磁熵
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Ilija K. Nikolov, Rong Cong, Adrien Rosuel, Stephen Carr, Ian R. Fisher, Dmitri E. Feldman, Adrian Del Maestro, Chandrasekhar Ramanathan, Vesna F. Mitrović
该研究利用相位敏感技术独立分辨不同对称性的相互作用，直接探测5d¹相对论性莫特绝缘体Ba₂NaOsO₆中竞争相互作用导致的轨道玻璃态。观测到短程轨道序持续至380 K，并在磁相变附近轨道色散急剧增强；该轨道色散产生定向有序，形成破缺晶体旋转对称性的轨道向列相。研究表明轨道向列态隐藏了缺失的磁熵，为解耦自旋与轨道自由度耦合产生的复杂序提供了方法学范例。

item.title: 双层镍酸盐La₃Ni₂O₇超导体中的配对机制
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Xianxin Wu, Tao Xiang, Jiangping Hu
该工作将此前提出的统一非常规高温超导体的基因原理和合作费米面规则拓展至双层多轨道体系La₃Ni₂O₇，识别出两个可提供主导配对力的反铁磁交换通道：由内层顶氧介导的dz²轨道层间最近邻交换Jₚₑᵣₚ，以及由面内氧介导的dz²与dx²-y²轨道层内最近邻交换Jₓᵧ。由于双层成键-反成键劈裂和dx²-y²轨道的B₁g对称性，这两个通道合作产生稳健的s^±超导态，在动量空间中镜面对称偶与奇的费米面口袋之间存在内部符号反转，两个配对通道均在β口袋上最大化超导能隙。

item.title: 通过手征腔模光诱导超导二极管效应
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Arpit Arora, Prineha Narang
本文提出通过手征腔模光子交换实现时间反演对称性破缺，从而光控超导二极管类非互易响应的方法。以转角双层石墨烯为例，揭示非互易超导响应源于光子诱导轨道磁化将手征性嵌入多体态。该原理适用于广泛超导体和腔设计，微波波段腔控为量子电路提供非侵入式、超快开关和片上集成的新功能，为非互易电路量子电动力学模型提供重要工具。

item.title: 二维铁电高阶拓扑绝缘体Tl₂S和SnS中轨道霍尔电导的极化工程
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 YingJie Hu, Heng Gao, Yabei Wu, Wei Ren
研究两类二维铁电高阶拓扑绝缘体（面外/面内极化）的拓扑起源，揭示其不同轨道输运行为及通过极化调控轨道霍尔电导(OHC)的机制。面内极化与高阶拓扑存在强耦合，可作为在带隙内可逆切换OHC平台的内禀手段。以Tl₂S和SnS为模型，分别展示持续性和电学可切换轨道输运，推进铁电性、高阶拓扑与轨道输运耦合的理解。

item.title: 磁性纳米线中拓扑平庸磁孤子的传播、产生与利用
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Kai-Tao Huang, X. S. Wang
该工作理论及数值研究铁磁纳米线中一维拓扑平庸磁孤子的性质与产生。由两个自由参数描述的近似解析孤子解经微磁模拟验证。孤子在各向异性不同介质界面处的反射和折射具有高度非线性，区别于线性自旋波。通过在至少两个连续区域交替施加相反方向的磁场或自旋极化电流脉冲，可产生一对反向传播的磁孤子，每个孤子落入可控的孤子解。这些磁孤子可驱动畴壁运动一定距离，实现与信息技术数字本质兼容的畴壁离散操控。

item.title: Quantum Computing of Phonon Spectra and Thermal Properties of Crystalline Solids
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Naman Khandelwal, Bikash K. Behera, Ashok Kumar, Prasanta K. Panigrahi
arXiv:2604.16863v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Variational quantum algorithms offer a promising framework for solving eigenvalue problems on near-term quantum hardware, yet their applicability beyond electronic structure calculations remains relatively unexplored. In this work, we investigate the quantum computing of lattice vibrational and thermodynamical properties by applying the variational quantum eigensolver and variational quantum deflation to phonon Hamiltonians derived from first-principles force constants obtained using density functional theory. The mass-weighted dynamical matrix is mapped onto a qubit-encoded Hermitian operator, enabling computation of the full set of acoustic and optical phonon branches of crystalline silicon and graphene using a reduced qubit register and d…

item.title: 量子高自旋霍尔绝缘体
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Takuto Kawakami, Igor Kuzmenko, Yshai Avishai, Yigal Meir, Masatoshi Sato
该研究发展了任意自旋J的量子自旋霍尔绝缘体理论，证明此类系统支持J+1/2对由非平庸镜面陈数保护的螺旋边缘模式，对应边缘理论由具有高阶色散的广义狄拉克费米子描述。这些模式产生独特的非线性电压输运响应；面内磁场在边缘谱中打开质量能隙，磁畴壁处存在(J+1/2)重简并的束缚态，具有非平庸绕数。该理论将量子自旋霍尔物理拓展至高自旋体系，并提示超冷原子气体中的可能实现方案。

item.title: 可调对称性自旋-1链中的量子猝灭
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Luis Eduardo Ramos-Solís, Sayan Choudhury, Freddy Jackson Poveda-Cuevas, Eduardo Ibarra-García-Padilla
该工作采用时间演化块衰减（TEBD）方法研究各向异性自旋-1海森堡链在实验可及初态下的动力学，通过调节四极相互作用强度参数J_q实现从非可积SU(2)到可积SU(3)模型的调控。研究表征了局域磁化、纠缠熵和自旋关联对J_q的依赖关系，在SU(3)对称点识别出新的守恒量，并以该守恒律允许的可达态数目为理论框架解释数值结果。

item.title: ToFiE：面向显微图像的拓扑感知纤维提取工作流，用于密集异质生物纤维网络的三维重建
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Risa Togo, Sara Cardona, Irène Nagle, Gijsje H. Koenderink, Behrooz Fereidoonnezhad, Mathias Peirlinck
纤维网络是生物学中普遍存在的结构组分，但现有分割方法难以保持网络拓扑。本文提出ToFiE——一种开源拓扑感知纤维提取工作流，可在保留三维连通性的前提下，从高分辨率显微图像重建密集异质纤维网络。通过合成荧光显微图像验证其性能，并应用于不同微观结构的胶原凝胶纤维网络重建，证明该方法在保持连接性方面的优势。

item.title: Morphogenetic Neural Plasticity for Adaptive Robotic Systems
item.description:
📚 Preprints
👤 Raunak Shrestha
We introduce MNPRAS (Morphogenetic Neural Plasticity for Robotic Adaptive Systems), a framework in which a robot’s physical joint topology and neural control architecture are cooptimised as a single unified problem rather than as sequential independent design decisions. The coupling mechanism is the MorphoCode a 64dimensional latent vector that encodes the body graph using a contrastivelytrained Graph Isomorphism Network, with architecture information entering implicitly through the performance signal. When the robot’s physical configuration changes, the updated MorphoCode retrieves a warmstart from a prebuilt corpus, reducing postreconfiguration adaptation time by up to 3.8× compared to coldstarting. Physical adaptation uses a modular platform with electromagneticallyactuated coupling in…

item.title: [ASAP] Mixed-Precision Ab Initio Tensor Network State Methods Adapted for NVIDIA Blackwell Technology via Emulated FP64 Arithmetic
item.description:
📚 ACS
👤 Cole Brower, Samuel Rodriguez Bernabeu, Jeff Hammond, John Gunnels, Sotiris S. Xantheas, Martin Ganahl, Andor Menczer, and Örs Legeza
Journal of Chemical Theory and Computation DOI: 10.1021/acs.jctc.6c00203

item.title: Multi-Label Phase Diagram Prediction in Complex Alloys via Physics-Informed Graph Attention Networks
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Eunjeong Park, Amrita Basak
arXiv:2604.16468v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Accurate phase equilibria are foundational to alloy design because they encode the underlying thermodynamics governing stability, transformations, and processing windows. However, while the CALculation of Phase Diagrams (CALPHAD) provides a rigorous thermodynamic framework, exploring multicomponent composition-temperature space remains computationally expensive and is typically limited to sparse section. To enable rapid phase mapping and alloy screening, we propose a physics-informed graph attention network (GAT) that learns element-aware representations and couples them with thermodynamic constraints for multi-label phase-set prediction in the Ag-Bi-Cu-Sn alloy system. Using about 25,000 equilibrium states generated with pycalphad, each c…
